title: apb.statistics request
description: Count completed APB transactions with optional direction and address filters.
x-description-zh: 按方向和地址过滤统计已完成 APB 事务。

session_id.description: 目标 xdebug session 标识。

mode.description: Action processing or return mode. Its legal values, default, and interactions are action-specific.

items.description: Known integer, hexadecimal, or SystemVerilog literal up to 64 bits.

values.description: Ordered values entries. Each item must satisfy the declared item contract.

oneOf.description: Structured address configuration. Only the declared properties are accepted.

mode.description: Action processing or return mode. Its legal values, default, and interactions are action-specific.

begin.description: Known integer, hexadecimal, or SystemVerilog literal up to 64 bits.

end.description: Known integer, hexadecimal, or SystemVerilog literal up to 64 bits.

oneOf.description: Structured address configuration. Only the declared properties are accepted.

mode.description: Action processing or return mode. Its legal values, default, and interactions are action-specific.

value.description: Known integer, hexadecimal, or SystemVerilog literal up to 64 bits.

mask.description: Known integer, hexadecimal, or SystemVerilog literal up to 64 bits.

oneOf.description: Structured address configuration. Only the declared properties are accepted.

address.description: Exactly one address filtering mode: exact queue, inclusive range, or value/mask.

filter.description: Completed-transaction filters; direction, IDs, and address are combined with AND.

name.description: Saved-object name in this action namespace; do not assume names are shared by cursors, lists, and protocol configs.

time_unit.description: Interprets only unitless time numbers; it never overrides a time string that already has a unit.

x-purpose: 统计已完成 APB 事务。
x-how_it_works: 复用 canonical APB 缓存，按 direction 与一种 address 模式过滤并分别统计 read/write。
x-when_to_use: 按方向或地址核对 APB 访问次数。
x-arg_contract_notes: required: name; filter direction/address with AND; address mode is exact/range/mask

use_when: 按方向和地址过滤统计已完成 APB 事务。
do_not_use_when: 不要把本 action 用于 apb.config.list、apb.config.load 的业务目标；请改用列出的同域 action。
constraints: required: name; filter direction/address with AND; address mode is exact/range/mask
